race.comment: SAFEDEEL (3) led the field up at this track and trip last time out and scored by 0.8L. Chris Parnham remains in the saddle and his form may have been franked earlier today. Looks a gelding on the rise and he profiles nicely for a race of this calibre. Can go back-to-back. JAZALOT (5) was just fair two back in stronger company but closed strongly most recently at this track and trip. That effort stacks up and if he gets some luck from the inside barrier, he'll be hard to hold out. AURORA QUEEN (6) missed by 0.5L two back before getting well back and failing to feature last time out at this track and trip. Pike hops in the saddle here and she's better than she showed last time out. Can bounce back to her best here and feature in the finish. NICKELPLAY (7) resumes here with a trial under her belt and she's a fresh winner in the past. Keep safe. SOLO VEGA (8) will find this much easier than her recent efforts and can bounce back.
